## Discussion

Thank you for starting a discussion!

**Category ideas:**
- Q&A: Ask questions about using Blackwell Ops or llama.cpp on Windows.
- Ideas: Suggest new features (multi-engine management, better telemetry, more forks...).
- Show and Tell: Share your setups, benchmarks, or cool use cases.
- General: Anything else related to local LLMs on Windows.

Please be respectful and on-topic. This is a great place for community conversation instead of using Issues for non-bug discussions.
